# UI Pirate — Enterprise UI/UX Design Agency

> UI Pirate is a global enterprise UI/UX design and frontend development agency founded by Vishal Anand, specializing in Angular, React, and Next.js development. Serving Fortune 500 and enterprise clients across USA, UK, Singapore, India, and Australia.

## About

UI Pirate designs and builds intuitive user interfaces for SaaS platforms, AI applications, mobile products, and enterprise software. The team has deep expertise in **Angular**, React, and Next.js frontend development. With 50+ successful projects and a 5.0 client rating, the team specializes in turning complex product requirements into clean, scalable designs and production-ready code that drives user engagement and business growth.

**Core Technologies**: Angular, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer, Webflow

**Founder**: Vishal Anand — 9+ years of experience in enterprise UI/UX design
**Team**: Vishal Anand (Founder & Lead Designer), Kartik Kumar (UI/UX Designer), Syed Musaddiq (UI/UX Designer)
**Headquarters**: India (serving clients globally)
**Founded**: 2015

## Services

- **SaaS Web & Mobile App Design & Development**: End-to-end UI/UX design and frontend development in Angular, React, and Next.js for SaaS platforms, AI tools, dashboards, and mobile-first products. From MVP wireframes to enterprise-grade products. Timeline: 1-2 months.
- **Landing Pages & Business Websites**: High-converting landing pages and corporate websites for startups and enterprises. Design + development in Angular, React, Next.js, Framer, or Webflow. Timeline: 2-4 weeks.
- **UI Development & Frontend Engineering**: Production-ready frontend development in Angular (v14+), React, and Next.js. Component-based architecture, responsive layouts, API integration, and performance optimization.
- **Design Systems & Component Libraries**: Custom design tokens, branded UI kits, documented and dev-ready Angular/React component libraries for scalable product teams. Timeline: 1-4 weeks.
- **Graphic Design**: Brand identity, infographics, newsletters, website graphics, social media visuals, and print-ready marketing materials.
- **Motion Graphics & Video Editing**: 2D/3D animations, social media reels/ads, explainer videos, sound design, color grading, and motion graphics for web and product.
- **UX Audits & Consultation**: Heuristic analysis, usability testing, friction point identification, and strategic UX recommendations for existing products.
- **3D Animation & Rendering**: 3D product visualization, architectural rendering, and animated 3D assets for marketing and product use.

## Notable Clients & Projects

- **Ipsos** (Israel) — Enterprise research platform redesign for VP of R&D
- **Xperiti** (New York, USA) — SaaS research platform for CEO & Founder
- **RevUp AI** (Dallas, Texas, USA) — AI SaaS platform for CEO
- **Bird** (San Francisco, USA) — Brand & product design for CEO
- **Awesome Health Club** (California, USA) — Platform design for Seed Investor
- **ArthAlpha** (Bangalore, India) — Fintech trading platform for Co-Founder
- **APAC Law Firm** (New Delhi, India) — AI-powered LegalTech platform
- **Netzhill** (Ontario, Canada) — Product design for Founder
- **Rings & I** (India) — E-commerce platform on Shopify
- **ION** — Medical supply chain SaaS platform
- **Brahmastra** — Fintech trading platform
- **StayPe** — Rental property management platform

## Industries Served

SaaS, Fintech, HealthTech, LegalTech, E-commerce, EdTech, PropTech, AI/ML Applications, Enterprise Software

## Target Audience

Enterprise clients, Fortune 500 companies, SaaS companies, tech startups, mobile app companies, and design/dev agencies needing a reliable UI/UX design partner.

## Pricing

Flexible pricing models including per-project, monthly retainer, and hourly rates. Transparent pricing with enterprise-grade quality at startup-friendly rates.
